data.title: Mohegan's Q3 results conference call on August 7th, 2025, 11:00 am ET - key update on company's financial performance.
data.description: Mohegan Tribal Gaming Authority, also known as Mohegan, has announced a conference call to discuss its third-quarter fiscal results for 2025. The call is scheduled for Thursday, August 7, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Anyone wishing to participate in the call can do so by...

data.title: MPLX LP to buy Northwind Midstream for $2.375B, boosting Permian natural gas and NGL value chains.
data.description: In Findlay, Ohio, on July 31, 2025, MPLX LP (NYSE: MPLX) revealed plans to buy Northwind Delaware Holdings LLC (Northwind Midstream) for $2.375 billion in cash, pending regular purchase price modifications. This move is part of MPLX's strategic expansion.

data.title: Phase 2 trial shows promise for SGX945 in treating Behçet's Disease, advancing hope for sufferers. Soligenix stock ticker: SNGX.
data.description: Research findings have indicated the potential for further development of SGX945 in an orphan disease. Soligenix, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNGX), a biopharmaceutical organization based in Princeton, NJ, has emphasized its commitment to advancing products for the treatment of this challenging medical condition. The study was conducted on July 31, 2025, and the company's focus is on progressing with their late-stage research and bringing effective treatments to the market.

data.title: Ergobaby unveils the Metro 3 Deluxe compact stroller, offering the roomiest seat yet. Luxurious upgrade to their travel stroller.
data.description: Ergobaby, a leading brand in ergonomic baby products, has announced the launch of the upgraded version of their best-selling travel stroller, the Metro 3 Deluxe. Known for providing the roomiest seat in its class, the Metro 3 Deluxe offers a more luxurious experience for parents on the go. The new model promises enhanced features and comfort levels, setting a new standard in lightweight travel gear. This release comes as part of Ergobaby's commitment to innovation, striving to make travel with young children easier and more convenient.

data.title: Vanda Pharmaceuticals Q2 2025 sales up by 27% to $29.3 million. Bysanti NDA accepted; PDUFA date Feb 21, 2026. Tradipitant NDA also accepted.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, Fanapt® experienced a significant growth in net product sales with a 27% increase, reaching $29.3 million compared to the same period in 2024. Additionally, Bysanti™ (milsaperidone) has had its New Drug Application (NDA) accepted for the treatment of bipolar I disorder and schizophrenia. The Prescription Drug User Fee Act (PDUFA) target action date for this NDA is set for February 21, 2026. Furthermore, the NDA for Tradipitant, intended for motion sickness, has also been accepted for filing.

data.title: PPL Corp's Q2 2025 earnings: GAAP EPS $0.25, ongoing EPS $0.32. Lower than 2024 ($0.38) due to timing and weather. Reaffirms 2025 forecast of $1.75 - $1.87 per share.
data.description: The earnings report for the second quarter of 2025 shows a per-share value of $0.25 based on generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP). The ongoing earnings per share for the same period in 2025 amount to $0.32, a decline from $0.38 in 2024. The decrease is attributed mainly to timing and weather factors. The company has reiterated its forecast for ongoing earnings in 2025, which is expected to range between $1.75 and $1.87 per share.

data.title: Southern Company's Q2 earnings in 2025 were $0.9 billion ($0.80 per share), down from $1.2 billion ($1.10 per share) in 2024.
data.description: Today, Southern Company disclosed their financial results for the second quarter of 2025, revealing earnings of $0.9 billion, translating to $0.80 per share. This marked a decrease from the second quarter of 2024, where earnings were $1.2 billion, or $1.10 per share. The company's performance in the first half of 2025 was also outlined, covering the period ending on June 30, 2025.

data.title: ATI reports Q2 2025 sales of $762M, with aerospace sales up 27%. Raises full-year earnings and cash flow guidance.
data.description: Sales in the aerospace and defense sector have continued to increase year-on-year, with the segment generating $762 million in revenue during the second quarter of 2025, accounting for 67% of total sales. The demand for commercial jet engines remains robust, with sales experiencing a 27% growth compared to the previous year. As a result, the company has decided to raise the mid-point of its full-year adjusted earnings and cash flow guidance.

data.title: Greenway Greenhouse Cannabis Corp signs supply deal with 4C LABS, a key medical partner.
data.description: In Kingsville, ON, on July 31, 2025, Greenway Greenhouse Cannabis Corporation (CSE: GWAY) (OTCQB: GWAYF) announced a recent supply agreement with 4C LABS, a prominent medical cannabis provider. Greenway, a reputable cultivator of top-tier greenhouse cannabis for Canada, finalized this deal for ongoing supply. This signifies a strategic move for Greenway, consolidating its position in the market while enhancing its distribution and market reach. The specific terms of the agreement and the volume of supply were not disclosed.

data.title: AGCO's Q2 net sales $2.6B down 18.8%, EPS $4.22, projected raise in FY net sales and adj. EPS.
data.description: DULUTH, Ga. - In their latest report, a company revealed a decrease in net sales to $2.6 billion, marking an 18.8% decline compared to the previous year. Earnings per share were reported at $4.22, with adjusted earnings per share at $1.35. Despite this, the company showcased strong free cash flow generation for the year thus far. Additionally, they have raised their full-year outlook for net sales and adjusted earnings per share. The report was released on July 31, 2025, as per a press release.

data.title: Unbuzzd Wellness Inc. starts Reg D capital raise to fund growth, IPO; assures no dilution for Quantum BioPharma shareholders.
data.description: The latest offering by Quantum BioPharma will not result in any dilution for the shareholders. This offering, which is aimed at raising funds, is designed to avoid negatively impacting the ownership percentage for existing shareholders. This move is expected to bring in a substantial amount of capital without reducing the stake held by current shareholders. This non-dilutive offering is seen as a strategic approach to securing additional funds without compromising the ownership interests of investors.

data.title: Jackbit Crypto Casino, popular among US players in 2025, offers 6,000+ games, supports 16+ cryptocurrencies, and eliminates rigid KYC requirements for most transactions. Operated by Ryker B.V., licensed in Curacao, and valued for its privacy-first approach.
data.description: Jackbit Crypto Casino, established in 2022 and operated by Ryker B.V., has become a leading US crypto casino known for its emphasis on privacy, fast payouts, and extensive game selection. It offers over 6,000 games from 90+ prominent game studios, covering slots, live dealer options, and sportsbook markets. The platform supports 16+ cryptocurrencies and has a no-KYC policy for most transactions, except for large withdrawals. Along with advanced security measures like SSL encryption and regular audits, Jackbit also offers a user-friendly interface, regular updates, and community-focused features like tournaments and VIP programs. The casino's unique selling points include its focus on player autonomy and personal privacy, key factors contributing to its popularity among both seasoned crypto gamblers and newcomers.

data.title: OlivePoint Capital buys Stella on the Park, a mixed-use project in Denver, with 216 units and 35,000 sq ft of retail space, at over 50% off.
data.description: In Denver, OlivePoint Capital, a real estate investment manager specializing in value-add and special situation opportunities in the lower middle market, has revealed the purchase of Stella on the Park, a mixed-use project built in 2021 in metro Denver. This acquisition, conducted off-market, includes 216 residential units and 35,000 square feet of retail space. OlivePoint secured the asset at over a 50% markdown compared to its replacement value.

data.title: S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) releases Q2 results, visit http://investor.spglobal.com/Quarterly-Earnings for details.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) announced its financial results for the second quarter. The company's earnings report and additional resources can be accessed at a provided link. For further details on supplemental information, conference call schedules, and webcast information, interested parties can visit the aforementioned website.

data.title: Orrön Energy sells 76 MW solar project in Germany to Saxovent Renewables for MEUR 4.0, with MEUR 2.0 paid at closing.
data.description: Orrön Energy AB is excited to share that they have finalized a deal with Saxovent Renewables to sell a 76-megawatt solar project in Germany. The total value of the agreement is MEUR 4.0, with MEUR 2.0 paid at closing and the remainder dependent on municipal and legislative approvals.

data.title: Blue Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: BACCU) allows separate trading of Class A shares and Share Rights from August 4, 2025.
data.description: A company based in Newport Beach, California, Blue Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: BACCU), revealed that starting from August 4, 2025, investors who purchased units in the Company's initial public offering will have the option to independently trade the Company's Class A ordinary shares.

data.title: GreenHill Investment Reporting gets TSG certification for ReportQuest platform, meeting performance standards. GAITHERSBURG, Md., July 31, 2025.
data.description: GreenHill Investment Reporting, a top independent investment performance measurement solutions provider, based in GAITHERSBURG, Md., made an announcement on July 31, 2025. The platform has successfully met high standards for accuracy and reliability. This achievement solidifies GreenHill's position in the industry.

data.title: Bill Eager appointed President of S&P Global Mobility and future CEO; Edouard Tavernier transitions to advisor role until 2025. S&P Global announces Q2 results.
data.description: Edouard Tavernier will shift to a Strategic Advisor position until September 30, 2025. S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) disclosed their Second Quarter 2025 results separately. A conference call is scheduled today at 8:30 a.m. EDT.
